name: Rebrand a Deck
description: Upload a PowerPoint deck and snap its colours and fonts to your brand — rebuilt on your device, nothing uploaded.

inputs.label: PowerPoint file
inputs.help: A .pptx file. It's read on your device and never uploaded.

inputs.label: Apply brand theme
inputs.help: Swap the deck's theme palette and fonts to your brand — every theme-linked colour follows automatically.

inputs.label: Colour mapping
inputs.help: Hardcoded colours found on the slides, each with its suggested brand colour. Remove a row to leave that colour alone.

inputs.label: Font mapping
inputs.help: Typefaces named in the deck, each with its brand replacement. Remove a row to keep that font.

inputs.label: Remove embedded fonts
inputs.help: Old-brand fonts embedded in the file are stale after a swap and may be license-encumbered.
